productName: Pure - Live Resin 510 Vape - Liquid Diamonds - Tropic Truffle
description: A convenient hybrid cartridge carrying Tropic Truffle's character into flavorful, on-demand vapor — discreet, simple, and ready to go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of apricot, tropical, and mango, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
